## 📝 Description
Clearly explain what this feature adds and why it’s needed.

---

## 🎯 Goals / Objectives
- Main goal of this feature:
- Expected impact:

---

## ✅ Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Enhancement / Improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration or docs update)

---

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project’s style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have documented my changes (API docs / README updated if needed)
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed

---

## 🧪 Testing Instructions
Explain how the reviewer can test the feature:  
1. Step 1  
2. Step 2  
3. Expected outcome  

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Demo (if applicable)
_Add screenshots, GIFs, or video links here._

---

## 📎 Related Issues / Tickets
Fixes # (issue number) or Links to related issues

---

## 💡 Additional Notes
Anything else reviewers should know? (e.g., tech debt, TODOs)
